tag: Close-up shot in warm oil lamp light: a woman's bare foot with gold ankle chains pressing down on a man's erect penis against his lower abdomen on a stone slab covered with damp linen. The foot sole is slightly pink, glistening with oil residue, toes relaxed and spread over the glans. The man's abdominal muscles are visibly tensing, his hands gripping the edges of the stone slab. Three masked women in white linen dresses lean in watching intently from different angles. Steam and warm golden lighting create an intimate ancient bathhouse atmosphere.
